creator: eischen@vigrid.com
text:
Can we move this up on the priority list?  GNAT needs to
be built with the previous version of GNAT (in this case
GNAT-3.10p needs to be built with GNAT-3.09).  It will
probably not be long before 3.11p is released, and it
might not be possible to build it without having 3.10p.

To save time in building GNAT, comment out the building
of the bootstrap in the port Makefile.

Thanks,

Dan Eischen
deischen@iworks.InterWorks.org
